ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "institution_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier used within the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the institution (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the beneficiary */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "beneficiary_type" TEXT /* Type of beneficiary (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treasury_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treasury branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the treasury branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the treasury branch */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution involved in the transaction */,
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the beneficiary of the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treasury branch where the transaction was registered and executed */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "date_registration" TEXT /* Date the transaction was registered */,
  "date_executed" TEXT /* Date the transaction was executed */,
  "invoice_no" TEXT /* Invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, bank transfer) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES treasury_branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_beneficiary_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the invoice is associated with */,
  "invoice_description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice, including details of the items and legal documents */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the item is associated with */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice item */,
  "item_number" TEXT /* Item number for reference */,
  "item_amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice item */,
  "item_date" TEXT /* Date of the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_items_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legal_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal document */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the legal document (e.g., U-Prokurim, P-Verbal) */,
  "document_number" TEXT /* Document number for reference */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the legal document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the legal document (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the legal document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_documents_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the log entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, audit) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is final (e.g., completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction detail */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the detail is associated with */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the transaction detail */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the transaction detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
